roles.15275583: triggering alert: ILL_UNBLINKING.exe created a remote thread in notepad.exe with an unbacked start address (StartModule '-') — remote code injection
roles.15275575: the notepad.exe target — spawned by ILL_UNBLINKING.exe with an EMPTY command line (a sacrificial process, not user-opened)
roles.15275927: notepad.exe target of the 2nd injection round (empty cmdline, spawned by ILL_UNBLINKING)
roles.15277465: notepad.exe target of the 3rd injection round (empty cmdline)

metadata.security_proposition: The source process performed remote-code injection into the observed notepad.exe targets.

attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = STRONG. A non-system binary repeatedly spawns notepad.exe processes and creates remote threads at unbacked start addresses. Direction injector->target is confirmed. Calibration role = PRESERVE (validator must not down-rank confirmed injection). Do not leak to model.

tier.why_single_source: notepad_windows-sysmon.log is host win-dc-84 (single). The sliver folder's other logs (T1055_windows-sysmon, sliver_windows-system) are the same host but separate/sparse captures; this case uses the notepad Sysmon capture only. Single-sensor.

boundary_definition: A0 = the first CreateRemoteThread (ILL_UNBLINKING -> notepad, unbacked StartModule, 22:02:30).
EV = the notepad target for A0, plus the 2nd and 3rd spawn+inject rounds (22:03 and 22:05).
Three rounds of 'spawn notepad -> create an unbacked remote thread' by the same source process lineage.
EXCLUDED: 27 EID10 process-access handle-opens (injection plumbing) and unrelated events.

main_alert_selection.selection_method: A CreateRemoteThread (EID8) into another process with an unbacked StartModule ('-') is the T1055 process-injection detection.
main_alert_selection.selection_reason: ILL_UNBLINKING (a non-system, randomly-named binary) creating an unbacked remote thread in a freshly spawned empty-cmdline notepad is unambiguous process injection; two more rounds corroborate it.

event_groups.description: 3x CreateRemoteThread ILL_UNBLINKING -> notepad with StartModule '-' (unbacked start address).
3x notepad.exe spawned by ILL_UNBLINKING with empty command line (spawned to be injected).

curation_notes.note: RESEARCHER-PRIVATE: STRONG / preserve. Repeated remote-thread creation at unbacked addresses confirms process injection. The validator must preserve a high severity.

EID8 direction = SOURCE(ILL_UNBLINKING) -> TARGET(notepad). StartModule '-' means Sysmon did not resolve the remote-thread start address to a loaded module. This supports unbacked injected code but does not identify a specific payload family.
2026-07-16: all three EID8 events and their notepad targets were checked against the raw source; omitted EID10 events are redundant handle-access plumbing.

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
